Translation.Description: The result of a first-rate collaboration between a master smith and a life archmage, this artifact will extend the life of its proprietor far beyond natural limits and even provide some healing in the heat of battle, albeit occasionally and arbitrarily.
Translation.Provides: Wayward Deathbane Effect - Has a 25% chance of healing 8 hit points when the wielder hits an enemy
Shield Bash - Knocks the victim back a tile
